# Summary

## Change Class

- [ ] Class A — prompt or doc only
- [ ] Class B — workflow contract change
- [ ] Class C — orchestration or specialist model change
- [ ] Class D — release-critical change

## What Changed

## Risk

- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High

## Validation

- [ ] `bash scripts/validate.sh`
- [ ] `bash scripts/smoke-test.sh`
- [ ] `bash scripts/dogfood.sh`
- [ ] `bash scripts/dogfood-report.sh --schema-only`
- [ ] Real golden runs executed when required

## Docs Updated

- [ ] README or getting started
- [ ] operational or manual docs
- [ ] changelog
- [ ] fixture expectations if behavior changed

## Notes
